query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.totalAmount,
  p.isArchived,
  p.accountingClosureId,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN pm.movementType = 'payment' THEN pm.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as totalPaid,
  p.totalAmount - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN pm.movementType = 'payment' THEN pm.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as balance
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN payments pm ON p.id = pm.projectId
WHERE p.isArchived = 1 AND p.accountingClosureId IS NULL AND p.status = 'entregado'
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.totalAmount, p.isArchived, p.accountingClosureId
HAVING balance > 0.01
ORDER BY balance DESC
